svg.title: ChainMind multi-agent architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing React frontend connecting to FastAPI backend with LangGraph orchestrator containing three specialized agents (Planner, Analyst, Recommendation) that use ML, simulation, and optimization tools, backed by a SQLite data layer.

g.text: Chat UI · Dashboard · Network map · Simulation panel
SQLite data layer — suppliers · routes · costs · DCs · simulations
